author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen - Announcement Trailer | PS5 Games
"Arisen, your time has come once again. 🔥

Dragon's Dogma 2 returns as Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen! Your unwritten epic begins on PS5, October 9, 2026. 

The dynamic fantasy world is expanded with new tales and thrilling encounters. Embark to a snowy new area in the north: the long-abandoned Norgan region, and take on 12 new dungeon challenges spread across the existing world of Dragon's Dogma 2. Also bring your Arisen and Pawns to life with new hairstyles and tattoo options.

Free Title Updates are on the way! The first arrives June 9 with quality-of-life improvements, including the addition of an Eternal Ferrystone and more Portcrystals. A second update in August brings framerate and performance improvements to all platforms, additional save slots, and many more adjustments and improvements. 

Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen contains both the Dragon's Dogma 2 base game and the Dark Arisen Expansion content in one package. The Dark Arisen Expansion will be available as a separate DLC on PS5.

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Tales of Eternia Remastered - Announcement Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
A classic adventure across Inferia and Celestia returns in Tales of Eternia Remastered, launching October 16, 2026 🌌

Relive the unforgettable journey of Reid, Farah, and the rest of the party bridging the divide between the two worlds!

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Final Fantasy Resonance - Announce Trailer | PS5 Games
FINAL FANTASY RESONANCE is the first FINAL FANTASY in HD‑2D! Coming to PlayStation 5 on October 22, 2026.

Return to the pixel‑art world of FINAL FANTASY, evolved from its classic roots. Travel with companions bound by fate and call on Visions, echoes of beloved FINAL FANTASY characters, to aid you in battle to uncover the truth behind a force that threatens to bring everything to ruin. ]

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Age of Empires IV: Raiders of the North - Announce Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/age-of-empires-iv/

Dominion of the North Sea awaits! 
A new force rises in this latest expansion to Age of Empires IV: Anniversary Edition. Command two new powerful civilizations: the Vikings and the Scots! Raid, defend, and evolve your strategy with new systems, expanded Crucible missions, and dynamic new battlefields. 
Coming Fall 2026. Wishlist today!

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
NBA The Run - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10011746/

It's time to RUN!

NBA THE RUN is out now on PlayStation 5. 

Take your favorite NBA stars to iconic streetball courts around the world, in this fast-paced, online 3v3 basketball game. Stack wins, earn cred and become the GOAT of THE RUN. Who's Got Next?

#ps5 #ps5games #nbatherun

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Saros - Finding Carcosa: Forging The World | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/saros/

Finding Carcosa: Forging the World is the final episode of the behind-the-scenes documentary that explores the creation of Saros. Join members of Housemarque’s development team spanning cinematics, weapon design, art, and gameplay, as they share their insights on developing the game. 

SAROS is out now on PS5, enhanced for PS5 Pro.

#ps5 #ps5games #saros

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Ember and Blade - Announcement Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/en-gb/concept/10018062

What happens when you combine bullet hell, hack-and-slash roguelite action, and challenging Souls-like bosses?

Check out the exclusive PlayStation 5 trailer for Ember & Blade.

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Destiny 2: The Collection Trailer | PS5, PS4 & PC Games
Play the definitive Destiny 2 experience.  Available now at https://bung.ie/destiny2collection.

Destiny 2: The Collection includes all available expansions and content packs in addition to four reward passes as well as access to endgame pursuits such as Raids, Dungeons, and more. 

You are a Guardian, defender of the Last City in a solar system filled with danger and mystery. Choose from three unique classes and dive into Destiny 2’s cinematic adventure featuring thrilling shooter action, incredible abilities, and an unforgettable sci-fi journey that can be experienced alone or with friends. Destiny 2: The Collection unlocks access to all available expansions and content packs including: 
- Forsaken Pack
- Shadowkeep Pack
- Beyond Light Pack
- 30th Anniversary Pack
- The Witch Queen
- Lightfall
- The Final Shape
- The Edge of Fate + 2 Reward Passes
- Renegades + 2 Reward Passes

Access to ten dungeons: 
- Shattered Throne 
- Pit of Heresy 
- Grasp of Avarice
- Duality
- Spire of the Watcher
- Ghosts of the Deep
- Warlord’s Ruin
- Vesper’s Host
- Sundered Doctrine
- Equilibrium  

Access to seven raids :
- Last Wish   
- Garden of Salvation   
- Deep Stone Crypt   
- Vow of the Disciple   
- Root of Nightmares   
- Salvation’s Edge   
- The Desert Perpetual

FOLLOW DESTINY:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DestinyTheGame
Twitter: https://www.twitter.com/destinythegame
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/destinythegame
Discord: http://www.discord.gg/destinygame

FOLLOW BUNGIE:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Bungie/
Twitter: https://www.twitter.com/bungie
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bungie/
⠀ ⠀ ⠀ ⠀
Dive into the free-to-play world of Destiny 2 to experience responsive first-person shooter combat, explore the mysteries of our solar system, and unleash elemental abilities against powerful enemies. Create your Guardian and collect unique weapons, armor, and gear to customize your look and playstyle. Experience Destiny 2’s cinematic story alone or with friends, join other Guardians for challenging co-op missions, or compete against them in a variety of PvP modes.

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #pc #pcgames #destiny2

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
The Boys: Trigger Warning - Launch Trailer | PSVR2 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10017892/

The Boys: Trigger Warning is available now on PlayStation VR2. Unleash devastating powers, fight corrupt superheroes, and join The Boys in a story-driven VR adventure set in the hit series universe. Featuring eye tracking support, enhanced visual fidelity, dynamic lighting, smooth high-refresh-rate gameplay, and PlayStation 5 Pro enhancements for even greater performance and immersion.

#psvr2 #psvr2games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Overwatch - End of the Line: Shion Hero Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/overwatch/

Time to find out who the streets of Tokyo really belong to. 

Join Shion, our newest Hero and the Hashimoto Clan's most terrifying elder, as she battles against Sojourn in our latest Hero Trailer, End of the Line. 

Find out what happens next in the Reign of Talon when Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den arrives on June 16. 

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4games #ps4 #overwatch2

text:
Sprawl Zero - Open Your Eyes Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10017182

SPRAWL zero is a fast-paced shooter inspired by the Golden Age of 2000s FPS. Survive a brutal cyberpunk city collapsing under military rule and cult fanaticism. 

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
MX vs ATV Legends - Motocross World Tour Release Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10000928/

ake on an international motocross journey across the wild landscapes of Scotland, the vibrant terrain of Mexico, and the breathtaking alpine trails of Switzerland.

Each destination includes:
• 2 brand-new motocross tracks
• 1 bonus event
• A dedicated Free Ride environment to explore

Tour Schedule:
• Scotland – June 9
• Mexico – June 23
• Switzerland – July 7

Three countries. Six tracks. One world tour built for legends.

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #MXvsATV #LegendsAreMade

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Kingdom Hearts Collection [I - III] Announce Trailer | PS5 Games
Enjoy the KINGDOM HEARTS series on PlayStation®5. Coming October 8, 2026!

KINGDOM HEARTS Collection [I ~ III] is a bundle value package that includes three titles:
KINGDOM HEARTS -HD 1.5+2.5 ReMIX-
KINGDOM HEARTS HD 2.8 Final Chapter Prologue
KINGDOM HEARTS III + Re Mind (DLC)
*these titles can also be purchased separately

#ps5 #ps5games #kingdomhearts

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
The Limited Edition 007 First Light DualSense controller is available now.
Consider this your license to play.

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Big Walk - Release Date Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/big-walk/

Big Walk is a cooperative multiplayer adventure about teamwork and talking. Coming to PS5 on August 4!

Set out with your friends through a wide-open world full of challenges, puzzles, and discoveries. You’ll need to work together to find your way around, stay in contact using an assortment of tools and toys, and figure out new ways to communicate when you suddenly find yourself speechless.

Adventuring aside, there’s plenty of time to just hang out. Sit and watch the sunset, or steal your friend’s binoculars and kick them into the ocean. Spending time with friends is the best part of a big walk.

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
The Elder Scrolls Online - Return of the Thieves Guild | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/the-elder-scrolls-online/

Sneak a peek at Return of the Thieves Guild, a new Season coming soon to The Elder Scrolls Online. Experience a new Thieves Guild questline in Glenumbra, take to the high seas in a new in-game event, tour Tamriel with the Prince of Madness, and encounter new challenges, mysteries, and ways to play when Season One arrives July 8.

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Say hello to Deborah Ann Woll, who portrays Faye in God of War Laufey.
Learn more about the protector of Jötunheim: play.st/4vxnkaJ
